primary_driver: Federal Reserve rate tightening cycle driving composite index toward threshold
recommended_actions: Review variable-rate loan portfolio exposure and stress-test for an additional 50–100bps rate increase over the next two quarters
Reassess credit loss reserves for segments most sensitive to borrower debt-service costs (e.g., personal loans, SMB lending)
Monitor payment delinquency trends weekly in the digital payments book as consumer liquidity may tighten if rates rise further
Lock in funding costs where possible through fixed-rate facilities or hedging instruments before any next Fed move
Establish a board-level rate risk trigger at index +1.35σ to initiate contingency liquidity planning ahead of a potential threshold breach
